data.content: Plan needs revision: the proposed file list and architecture only update compatibility workflow prompt wiring, but runtime claim/poll prompts come from ProfileRegistry::load_for_repo() and ProfileDefinition::prompt_for_action_state() in src/profile.rs and src/poll_claim.rs. Built-in profiles loaded from src/profiles.toml currently keep empty action_prompts, and load_for_repo() skips builtin workflow profiles, so changing src/installed_workflows/compatibility.rs alone will not change agent prompts for builtin profiles. Revise the plan to include the runtime path that seeds rendered per-profile prompts into the built-in registry used by claim/poll, then keep the skills/loom/test updates aligned with that path.
